description: Project builds clean: npm run build exits 0 with no TypeScript errors
Content loader returns chapters parsed from Markdown frontmatter, sorted by order
App routes resolve: /, /guide/:slug, /gym, /cookbook all mount without error
steps: confirm unknown route falls back to home

description: PracticeSpec + Chapter types exported from src/content/types.ts and consumed by screens
Editorial reskin: theme token VALUES swapped, no arcade/Fredoka look, components unchanged
App shell has a clean top nav (Guide / Gym / Cookbook) and a Substack footer; no game HUD
Onboarding/'jack in' overlay and HUD components are removed
GuideHome renders a table of contents listing every chapter in order with summaries
ChapterReader renders chapter body as Markdown with prev/next navigation
Reading position is remembered via storage.ts (bookmark), not XP
A line of only ::practice:: in a chapter renders an inline working PracticeBox
steps: open a chapter with gym frontmatter

description: PracticeBox shows a live rubric score, per-signal feedback, and the top fix as the user types
PracticeBox honors a spec's require[] so a drill grades only on its target signals
Standalone /gym lists at least 6 practice drills, each independently scored
Cookbook Browser lists AI-use entries grouped/filterable by real-life goal
Each Cookbook entry has a copy-able starter prompt with a working copy button
content/cookbook.json is generated from ../ai-cookbook by scripts/gen-cookbook.mjs
All 8 chapters exist as Markdown in content/chapters with valid frontmatter
Chapters are in Michael's voice: adult, practical, NO em dashes, no markdown tables
At least 4 chapters embed a ::practice:: drill with a matching gym frontmatter block
scripts/build-epub.mjs produces public/downloads/practical-ai.epub from the chapters
steps: confirm all chapters present in order

description: epub strips web-only ::practice:: directives and contains clean prose
GuideHome shows a 'Download the ebook' CTA linking to the epub
steps: confirm link resolves to the epub path

description: OG/social cards and <title> updated to Practical AI (no leftover AI Trainer/game copy)
All KILL-list game files removed; no dead imports remain
Existing rubric/engine unit tests still pass (npm test)
Zero runtime network calls; app works offline after first load
Responsive to 375px with no horizontal scroll; keyboard navigable; reduced motion honored
Rubric engine adds advanced signals (decomposition, verification) used only when a drill requires them
steps: call scorePrompt with require including an advanced signal
confirm default scorePrompt still returns exactly 10 signals

description: Boot Camp screen mounts at /bootcamp with at least 5 intermediate drills, each scored
steps: confirm decomposition/verification chips light on a strong answer

description: Top nav exposes Boot Camp between Gym and Cookbook; route falls back cleanly
steps: confirm it routes to the Boot Camp screen

description: Part Two chapters 08-11 exist (building-with-ai, agent-teams, the-cross-check, routing-loops-and-gates) with valid frontmatter and a ::practice:: drill
steps: confirm each Part Two chapter parses and embeds a practice drill

description: Part Two chapters are in Michael's voice: adult, practical, NO em dashes, no markdown tables
